proof_surfaces.detail: Owned bounded reference receipt over the PyTorch-style FlashAttention2 path.
Retained parity and memory-surface receipt for the reference path.

rows.detail: The PyTorch-only FlashAttention adapter is closed by the owned tiled forward/backward reference implementation plus the retained parity receipt.

proof_surfaces.detail: Owned bounded fused CUDA receipt family for the Triton-class adapter surface.
Retained admitted-path or explicit-refusal receipt for the fused CUDA lane.

rows.detail: The Triton-class FlashAttention adapter is closed by the owned fused CUDA receipt family, with explicit refusal posture on non-CUDA hosts.

proof_surfaces.detail: Owned bounded constructor surface for the individual-parameter DDP lane.
Retained two-rank parity receipt for the bounded individual-parameter DDP lane.

rows.detail: The individual-parameter DDP adapter is mapped to the owned two-rank receipt lane above the A1 trainer.

proof_surfaces.detail: The after-backward hook is represented by retained per-parameter synchronization receipts before the optimizer step.
Retained proof that the bounded after-backward sync path stays aligned with the non-parallel baseline.

rows.detail: The individual-parameter after-backward hook is closed by retained per-parameter sync receipts and bounded parity proof.

proof_surfaces.detail: Owned bounded constructor surface for the bucketed DDP lane.
Retained two-rank bucket-plan and parity receipt for the bounded bucketed DDP lane.

rows.detail: The bucketed DDP adapter is mapped to the owned bucket-planning and parity receipt lane above the A1 trainer.

proof_surfaces.detail: The after-backward hook is represented by deterministic bucket completion receipts.
Retained proof that after-backward bucket synchronization stays aligned with the non-parallel baseline.

rows.detail: The bucketed after-backward hook is closed by retained bucket completion receipts and bounded parity proof.

proof_surfaces.detail: The train-batch-start hook is represented by explicit pending-bucket reset receipts.
Retained proof that the bounded bucket reset surface exists for every step.

rows.detail: The bucketed train-batch-start hook is closed by retained reset receipts tied to the bounded bucket-plan lane.

proof_surfaces.detail: Owned bounded constructor surface for the sharded-optimizer lane.
Retained proof that disjoint optimizer-state ownership reconstructs the non-sharded baseline after each bounded step.

rows.detail: The sharded optimizer adapter is mapped to the owned bounded ZeRO-stage-1-style receipt lane with retained checkpoint-state reconstruction proof.

claim_boundary: This report closes Stanford CS336 Assignment 2 only as a bounded psionic reference lane. It proves every Stanford A2 adapter family is mapped to owned Rust surfaces plus checked-in profiling, attention, DDP, and sharded-optimizer proof bundles. It does not promote the bounded systems lane into the actual Psion pretraining operator lane, and it does not claim admitted distributed throughput or transport-backed cluster execution.
